title: Day 8 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition 2
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these two sentences:  

Sentence 1 - へや は ひろい です。 そして きれい です。 (heya wa hiroi des. soshite kiree des) = The room is big and it's clean.

Sentence 2 - へや は せまい です が、 きれい です。 (heya wa semai des ga, kirei des) = The room is small but it's clean.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
